title: Fix leaking kitchen sink
description: The PVC pipe under the main kitchen sink is dripping constantly. Need it fixed or replaced today.

title: Install 2 Ceiling Fans
description: I have purchased two new ceiling fans. I just need a professional to wire and hang them safely in the TV lounge.

title: Repair Broken Wooden Chair
description: One of my dining chairs has a broken leg. Need someone to use wood glue and nails to make it sturdy again.

title: Full House Cleaning
description: Moving into a new 5-marla house. Need a deep clean of the floors, 2 bathrooms, and kitchen before we bring the furniture.

title: Fix AC Cooling Issue
description: My 1.5 Ton AC is turning on but throwing warm air. Might need gas refilling or a capacitor change.
